mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN a.value IS NULL THEN 'null' ELSE a.value END AS value, CASE WHEN a.label IS NULL THEN '中间表(0)' WHEN b.label IS NULL THEN CONCAT(a.label, '(0)') ELSE b.label END AS label FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT c.CODETEXT AS value, c.CODETEXT AS label, d.primaryLabel, c.CODENAME FROM V_CLASSIFY_INFO c RIGHT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT CODEID, CODETEXT AS primaryLabel FROM V_CLASSIFY_INFO WHERE CODETEXT = #{dataOrganizationType} AND PARCODEID IS NOT NULL ) d ON c.PARCODEID = d.CODEID ) a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CONCAT(SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH, '(', COUNT(1), ')') AS label, SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH AS value, PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH AS primaryLabel FROM CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE WHERE SJXJBM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH, PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH ) b ON a.label = b.value AND a.primaryLabel = b.primaryLabel ORDER BY CODENAME

SELECT CASE WHEN ciad.yj IS NULL THEN 'null' ELSE ciad.yj END AS sjzzyjfl, CASE WHEN ciad.yj = '业务要素索引库' THEN '业务要素索引库' WHEN ciad.ej IS NULL THEN 'null' ELSE ciad.ej END AS sjzzejfl, CASE WHEN ciad.yj = '业务要素索引库' THEN '业务要素索引库' WHEN ciad.ej IS NULL THEN 'null' ELSE ciad.sj END AS sjzzsjfl FROM ( SELECT h.* FROM ( SELECT sjxjbm, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY UPPER(table_type), UPPER(table_project), UPPER(table_name_en) ORDER BY statistics_time DESC) AS rnn FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE statistics_time >= date(NOW()) AND sjxjbm IS NOT NULL ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 ) toa LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT sjxjbm AS sjxjbm1, primaryorganizationch AS yj, firstorganizationch AS ej, secondaryorganizationch AS sj FROM classify_interface_all_date ) ciad ON toa.sjxjbm COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = ciad.sjxjbm1 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci
SELECT DISTINCT YYYXTJSGS FROM synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO WHERE YYYXTJSGS IS NOT NULL
SELECT DISTINCT SJZYSQDWMC FROM synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO WHERE SJZYSQDWMC IS NOT NULL

select.if:
SELECT objectname AS tableNameCh, UPPER(TABLENAME) AS tableNameEn, tableId AS resourceIdentify FROM synlte.object_store_info WHERE tableid IN ( SELECT tableid FROM synlte.object WHERE UPPER(sjzzyjflvallue) LIKE CONCAT(UPPER('%'), #{levelCode}, '%') )
AND ( UPPER(objectname) LIKE CONCAT(UPPER('%'), #{search}, '%') OR UPPER(TABLENAME) LIKE CONCAT(UPPER('%'), #{search}, '%') OR UPPER(tableId) LIKE CONCAT(UPPER('%'), #{search}, '%') )

SELECT objectname AS tableNameCh, UPPER(TABLENAME) AS tableNameEn, tableId AS resourceIdentify FROM synlte.object_store_info WHERE tableid IN ( SELECT tableid FROM synlte.object WHERE UPPER(sjzzejflvalue) LIKE CONCAT(UPPER('%'), #{levelCode}, '%') )
AND ( UPPER(objectname) LIKE CONCAT(UPPER('%'), #{search}, '%') OR UPPER(TABLENAME) LIKE CONCAT(UPPER('%'), #{search}, '%') OR UPPER(tableId) LIKE CONCAT(UPPER('%'), #{search}, '%') )

SELECT objectname AS tableNameCh, UPPER(TABLENAME) AS tableNameEn, tableId AS resourceIdentify FROM synlte.object_store_info WHERE tableid IN ( SELECT tableid FROM synlte.object WHERE UPPER(sjzzejflvalue) = UPPER(#{levelCode}) )
AND ( UPPER(objectname) LIKE CONCAT(UPPER('%'), #{search}, '%') OR UPPER(TABLENAME) LIKE CONCAT(UPPER('%'), #{search}, '%') OR UPPER(tableId) LIKE CONCAT(UPPER('%'), #{search}, '%') )
